title: Mellow Smoky Mediterranean Eggplant Bake
description: A plant-based friendly Mediterranean dish featuring smoky olive oil and wood-fired baked eggplant, perfect for a lazy Sunday.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoky olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Add the sliced eggplant to the bowl and toss to coat with the olive oil mixture.
Spread the eggplant slices out in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine kalamata olives, artichoke hearts, sun-dried tomatoes, and fresh oregano.
After the eggplant has baked for 20 minutes, remove it from the oven and top each slice with a spoonful of the olive and artichoke mixture.
Return the eggplant to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Remove the eggplant from the oven and drizzle with lemon juice.
Serve the eggplant hot, garnished with additional fresh oregano if desired.
